job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.
